The specific 11.72% APY metric adds credibility but doesn't trigger urgency or FOMO since stablecoin yields are familiar to the existing DeFi audience, and the tweet lacks a contrarian angle or narrative tension (like "banks can't compete" or risk warnings) that would prompt sharing beyond the Kamino community.
